members.name: AddIconItem
members.signature: public int AddIconItem(Texture2D icon, bool selectable)
members.summary: Adds an item to the item list with no text, only an icon. Returns the index of an added item.

members.name: AddItem
members.signature: public int AddItem(String text, Texture2D icon, bool selectable)
members.summary: Adds an item to the item list with specified text. Returns the index of an added item. Specify an [param icon], or use [code]null[/code] as the [param icon] for a list item with no icon. If [param selectable] is [code]true[/code], the list item will be selectable.

members.name: CenterOnCurrent
members.signature: public void CenterOnCurrent(bool centerVerically, bool centerHorizontally)
members.summary: Ensures the currently selected item (the first selected item if multiple selection is enabled) is visible, adjusting the scroll position as necessary to place the item at the center of the list if possible. See also [method ensure_current_is_visible]. Fails and prints an error if both arguments are [code]false[/code].

members.name: Clear
members.summary: Removes all items from the list.

members.name: Deselect
members.summary: Ensures the item associated with the specified index is not selected.

members.name: DeselectAll
members.summary: Ensures there are no items selected.

members.name: EnsureCurrentIsVisible
members.summary: Ensures the currently selected item (the first selected item if multiple selection is enabled) is visible, adjusting the scroll position as necessary. See also [method center_on_current].

members.name: ForceUpdateListSize
members.summary: Forces an update to the list size based on its items. This happens automatically whenever size of the items, or other relevant settings like [member auto_height], change. The method can be used to trigger the update ahead of next drawing pass.

members.name: GetHScrollBar
members.summary: Returns the horizontal scrollbar. [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [member CanvasItem.visible] property.

members.name: GetItemAtPosition
members.signature: public int GetItemAtPosition(Vector2 position, bool exact)
members.summary: Returns the item index at the given [param position]. When there is no item at that point, -1 will be returned if [param exact] is [code]true[/code], and the closest item index will be returned otherwise. [b]Note:[/b] The returned value is unreliable if called right after modifying the [ItemList], before it redraws in the next frame.

members.name: GetItemAutoTranslateMode
members.summary: Returns item's auto translate mode.

members.name: GetItemCustomBgColor
members.summary: Returns the custom background color of the item specified by [param idx] index.

members.name: GetItemCustomFgColor
members.summary: Returns the custom foreground color of the item specified by [param idx] index.

members.name: GetItemIcon
members.summary: Returns the icon associated with the specified index.

members.name: GetItemIconModulate
members.summary: Returns a [Color] modulating item's icon at the specified index.

members.name: GetItemIconRegion
members.summary: Returns the region of item's icon used. The whole icon will be used if the region has no area.

members.name: GetItemLanguage
members.summary: Returns item's text language code.

members.name: GetItemMetadata
members.summary: Returns the metadata value of the specified index.

members.name: GetItemRect
members.signature: public Rect2 GetItemRect(int idx, bool expand)
members.summary: Returns the position and size of the item with the specified index, in the coordinate system of the [ItemList] node. If [param expand] is [code]true[/code] the last column expands to fill the rest of the row. [b]Note:[/b] The returned value is unreliable if called right after modifying the [ItemList], before it redraws in the next frame.

members.name: GetItemText
members.summary: Returns the text associated with the specified index.

members.name: GetItemTextDirection
members.summary: Returns item's text base writing direction.

members.name: GetItemTooltip
members.summary: Returns the tooltip hint associated with the specified index.

members.name: GetSelectedItems
members.summary: Returns an array with the indexes of the selected items.

members.name: GetVScrollBar
members.summary: Returns the vertical scrollbar. [b]Warning:[/b] This is a required internal node, removing and freeing it may cause a crash. If you wish to hide it or any of its children, use their [member CanvasItem.visible] property.

members.name: IsAnythingSelected
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if one or more items are selected.

members.name: IsItemDisabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the item at the specified index is disabled.

members.name: IsItemIconTransposed
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the item icon will be drawn transposed, i.e. the X and Y axes are swapped.

members.name: IsItemSelectable
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the item at the specified index is selectable.

members.name: IsItemTooltipEnabled
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the tooltip is enabled for specified item index.

members.name: IsSelected
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the item at the specified index is currently selected.

members.name: MoveItem
members.signature: public void MoveItem(int fromIdx, int toIdx)
members.summary: Moves item from index [param from_idx] to [param to_idx].

members.name: RemoveItem
members.summary: Removes the item specified by [param idx] index from the list.

members.name: Select
members.signature: public void Select(int idx, bool single)
members.summary: Selects the item at the specified index. [b]Note:[/b] This method does not trigger the item selection signal.

members.name: SetItemAutoTranslateMode
members.signature: public void SetItemAutoTranslateMode(int idx, int mode)
members.summary: Sets the auto translate mode of the item associated with the specified index. Items use [constant Node.AUTO_TRANSLATE_MODE_INHERIT] by default, which uses the same auto translate mode as the [ItemList] itself.

members.name: SetItemCustomBgColor
members.signature: public void SetItemCustomBgColor(int idx, Color customBgColor)
members.summary: Sets the background color of the item specified by [param idx] index to the specified [Color].

members.name: SetItemCustomFgColor
members.signature: public void SetItemCustomFgColor(int idx, Color customFgColor)
members.summary: Sets the foreground color of the item specified by [param idx] index to the specified [Color].

members.name: SetItemDisabled
members.signature: public void SetItemDisabled(int idx, bool disabled)
members.summary: Disables (or enables) the item at the specified index. Disabled items cannot be selected and do not trigger activation signals (when double-clicking or pressing [kbd]Enter[/kbd]).

members.name: SetItemIcon
members.signature: public void SetItemIcon(int idx, Texture2D icon)
members.summary: Sets (or replaces) the icon's [Texture2D] associated with the specified index.

members.name: SetItemIconModulate
members.signature: public void SetItemIconModulate(int idx, Color modulate)
members.summary: Sets a modulating [Color] of the item associated with the specified index.

members.name: SetItemIconRegion
members.signature: public void SetItemIconRegion(int idx, Rect2 rect)
members.summary: Sets the region of item's icon used. The whole icon will be used if the region has no area.

members.name: SetItemIconTransposed
members.signature: public void SetItemIconTransposed(int idx, bool transposed)
members.summary: Sets whether the item icon will be drawn transposed.

members.name: SetItemLanguage
members.signature: public void SetItemLanguage(int idx, String language)
members.summary: Sets the language code of the text for the item at the given index to [param language]. This is used for line-breaking and text shaping algorithms. If [param language] is empty, the current locale is used.

members.name: SetItemMetadata
members.signature: public void SetItemMetadata(int idx, Variant metadata)
members.summary: Sets a value (of any type) to be stored with the item associated with the specified index.

members.name: SetItemSelectable
members.signature: public void SetItemSelectable(int idx, bool selectable)
members.summary: Allows or disallows selection of the item associated with the specified index.

members.name: SetItemText
members.signature: public void SetItemText(int idx, String text)
members.summary: Sets text of the item associated with the specified index.

members.name: SetItemTextDirection
members.signature: public void SetItemTextDirection(int idx, int direction)
members.summary: Sets item's text base writing direction.

members.name: SetItemTooltip
members.signature: public void SetItemTooltip(int idx, String tooltip)
members.summary: Sets the tooltip hint for the item associated with the specified index.

members.name: SetItemTooltipEnabled
members.signature: public void SetItemTooltipEnabled(int idx, bool enable)
members.summary: Sets whether the tooltip hint is enabled for specified item index.

members.name: SortItemsByText
members.summary: Sorts items in the list by their text.

members.name: AllowReselect
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the currently selected item can be selected again.

members.name: AllowRmbSelect
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], right mouse button click can select items.

members.name: AllowSearch
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], allows navigating the [ItemList] with letter keys through incremental search.

members.name: AutoHeight
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the control will automatically resize the height to fit its content.

members.name: AutoWidth
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the control will automatically resize the width to fit its content.

members.name: FixedColumnWidth
members.summary: The width all columns will be adjusted to. A value of zero disables the adjustment, each item will have a width equal to the width of its content and the columns will have an uneven width.

members.name: FixedIconSize
members.summary: The size all icons will be adjusted to. If either X or Y component is not greater than zero, icon size won't be affected.

members.name: IconMode
members.summary: The icon position, whether above or to the left of the text. See the [enum IconMode] constants.

members.name: IconScale
members.summary: The scale of icon applied after [member fixed_icon_size] and transposing takes effect.

members.name: ItemCount
members.summary: The number of items currently in the list.

members.name: MaxColumns
members.summary: Maximum columns the list will have. If greater than zero, the content will be split among the specified columns. A value of zero means unlimited columns, i.e. all items will be put in the same row.

members.name: MaxTextLines
members.summary: Maximum lines of text allowed in each item. Space will be reserved even when there is not enough lines of text to display. [b]Note:[/b] This property takes effect only when [member icon_mode] is [constant ICON_MODE_TOP]. To make the text wrap, [member fixed_column_width] should be greater than zero.

members.name: SameColumnWidth
members.summary: Whether all columns will have the same width. If [code]true[/code], the width is equal to the largest column width of all columns.

members.name: ScrollHintMode
members.summary: The way which scroll hints (indicators that show that the content can still be scrolled in a certain direction) will be shown.

members.name: SelectMode
members.summary: Allows single or multiple item selection. See the [enum SelectMode] constants.

members.name: TextOverrunBehavior
members.summary: The clipping behavior when the text exceeds an item's bounding rectangle.

members.name: TileScrollHint
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the scroll hint texture will be tiled instead of stretched. See [member scroll_hint_mode].

members.name: WraparoundItems
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the control will automatically move items into a new row to fit its content. See also [HFlowContainer] for this behavior. If [code]false[/code], the control will add a horizontal scrollbar to make all items visible.

rawMembers.name: item_{index}/disabled
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the item at [code]index[/code] is disabled. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: item_{index}/icon
rawMembers.summary: The icon of the item at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: item_{index}/selectable
rawMembers.summary: If [code]true[/code], the item at [code]index[/code] is selectable. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

rawMembers.name: item_{index}/text
rawMembers.summary: The text of the item at [code]index[/code]. [b]Note:[/b] [code]index[/code] is a value in the [code]0 .. item_count - 1[/code] range.

signals.name: EmptyClicked
signals.summary: Emitted when any mouse click is issued within the rect of the list but on empty space. [param at_position] is the click position in this control's local coordinate system.

signals.name: ItemActivated
signals.summary: Emitted when specified list item is activated via double-clicking or by pressing [kbd]Enter[/kbd].

signals.name: ItemClicked
signals.summary: Emitted when specified list item has been clicked with any mouse button. [param at_position] is the click position in this control's local coordinate system.

signals.name: ItemSelected
signals.summary: Emitted when specified item has been selected. Only applicable in single selection mode. [member allow_reselect] must be enabled to reselect an item.

signals.name: MultiSelected
signals.summary: Emitted when a multiple selection is altered on a list allowing multiple selection.

values.name: ICON_MODE_LEFT
values.summary: Icon is drawn to the left of the text.

values.name: ICON_MODE_TOP
values.summary: Icon is drawn above the text.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_MODE_BOTH
values.summary: Scroll hints will be shown at the top and bottom.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_MODE_BOTTOM
values.summary: Only the bottom scroll hint will be shown.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_MODE_DISABLED
values.summary: Scroll hints will never be shown.

values.name: SCROLL_HINT_MODE_TOP
values.summary: Only the top scroll hint will be shown.

values.name: SELECT_MULTI
values.summary: Allows selecting multiple items by holding [kbd]Ctrl[/kbd] or [kbd]Shift[/kbd].

values.name: SELECT_SINGLE
values.summary: Only allow selecting a single item.

values.name: SELECT_TOGGLE
values.summary: Allows selecting multiple items by toggling them on and off.

constants.name: ICON_MODE_TOP
constants.summary: Icon is drawn above the text.

constants.name: ICON_MODE_LEFT
constants.summary: Icon is drawn to the left of the text.

constants.name: SELECT_SINGLE
constants.summary: Only allow selecting a single item.

constants.name: SELECT_MULTI
constants.summary: Allows selecting multiple items by holding [kbd]Ctrl[/kbd] or [kbd]Shift[/kbd].

constants.name: SELECT_TOGGLE
constants.summary: Allows selecting multiple items by toggling them on and off.

constants.name: SCROLL_HINT_MODE_DISABLED
constants.summary: Scroll hints will never be shown.

constants.name: SCROLL_HINT_MODE_BOTH
constants.summary: Scroll hints will be shown at the top and bottom.

constants.name: SCROLL_HINT_MODE_TOP
constants.summary: Only the top scroll hint will be shown.

constants.name: SCROLL_HINT_MODE_BOTTOM
constants.summary: Only the bottom scroll hint will be shown.
